_instructions: 2. Select your project → Project Settings (gear icon)
4. Click 'Generate new private key' → confirm → a JSON file downloads
6. Place it in this folder:  backend/firebase/serviceAccountKey.json
7. The file should look like the template below — NEVER commit it to Git

_template.private_key:
-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
YOUR_PRIVATE_KEY
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
